prompt: Subtle ambient motion for a website hero background. The pen tip continues a barely-perceptible micro-stroke on the page. The dog-eared corner of the cream paper lifts with the faintest air-current breath. The black coffee in the ceramic mug holds a near-still surface micro-tremor. Late-afternoon directional light slowly creeps a few degrees rightward across the wooden desk, deepening the navy plaster wall vignette. The film grain breathes. Locked-off camera, no pan, no zoom, no cuts. Pure ambient. No text, no logos, no words. Motion under 5 percent of frame at any moment. Photographic, filmic, real.
